Thanks for contributing to Multilogin Labs!

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What changed and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] 🛠 Script / tool
- [ ] 📚 Documentation
- [ ] 🌍 Translation / locale
- [ ] ⚔️ Comparison
- [ ] 🌏 Country / platform / use-case playbook
- [ ] 📡 API / cookbook recipe
- [ ] 🎨 UI / Pages / banner
- [ ] 🤖 CI / automation
- [ ] 🧹 Chore / refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] No `.env`, tokens, or profile UUIDs committed
- [ ] Partner link uses full UTM URL (`?utm_source=saas&utm_medium=partner&a_aid=saas&a_bid=f5fad549`)
- [ ] Promo codes (`SAAS50`, `MIN50`) preserved where present
- [ ] Tested locally if script changed
- [ ] Markdown lints clean (`npx markdownlint-cli2 "docs/**/*.md"`)
- [ ] If new doc page, added to:
  - [ ] `docs/SEARCH_INDEX.md`
  - [ ] Section README (e.g. `docs/guides/README.md`)
  - [ ] Sitemap regenerated (`npm run sitemap`)
